styles.css: .wp-block-search__inside-wrapper{border: none; border-radius: 25px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.50); padding: 15px 15px 16px 15px; width: 193px; } & .wp-block-search__input{background:none; color: black; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; height: 16px; margin: auto;} & .wp-block-search__input::placeholder{color: black;} & .wp-block-search__button {padding: 0; border: none; box-shadow: none;} & .wp-block-search__button svg {fill: black !important; stroke-width: 2; transform: rotate(280deg); min-width: 15px !important; width: 15px !important;} & .wp-block-search__button svg path {stroke: black; stroke-width: 2;}
